error_signature: Activation key has already been used on this instance
title: Activation key error after domain change
symptom: After changing the domain from an IP address to a private domain, n8n throws an error stating 'Activation key has already been used on this instance' when trying to apply the activation key.
applies_when: n8n is installed on a new domain
Activation key was initially registered with an IP address
not_this_if: Activation key is being applied for the first time
root_cause: When n8n is registered with an IP address, the activation key is tied to that IP. Changing the domain without clearing the previous license causes conflicts, as the system still recognizes the old registration.
fix_steps: Run the command `n8n license:clear` in the terminal
Attempt to apply the activation key again
agent_instruction: Clear the existing license and restart n8n before reapplying the activation key.
